nodes.itemHTML: • DNSstars357 - A library for parsing and serializing DNS messages. Includes a basic DNS client and server.
• StackEdit - In-browser markdown editor.
• HackMD - HackMD lets you create realtime collaborative Markdown notes on all platforms.
• Markable.in - Remarkable Markdown Editor.
• remark - A simple, in-browser, Markdown-driven slideshow tool targeted at people who know their way around HTML and CSS.
• GitPrint - Easily print GitHub Markdown.
• Tensorflow FastTextstars305 - A simple embedding based text classifier inspired by Facebook's fastText.

• HyperApp
    • hyperapp-boilerplatestars47 Boilerplate showing how to create a production-ready Hyperapp application.
• GitDownstars440 – GitHub's Markdown preprocessor. :octocat:
• GitHub's Mastering Markdown
• defclass-stdstars34 - a shortcut macro to write DEFCLASS forms quickly. LLGPL.
• cl-monero-toolsstars18 - Common Lisp toolbox to work with the Monero cryptocurrency. GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.

• peercoin-blockchain-parserstars4 - parse the blockchain contained in a file and export some of its data to a text file, a SQL script or a database. It can also create a database using the RPC of a Peercoin daemon as source of data instead of a blockchain file. LGPL3. Not in Quicklisp.

• peercoin-calculatorstars2 - This program gives you the probability of generating a POS or POW block within 10 minutes, 24 hours, 31 days, 90 days and 1 year, as well as the reward that can be expected. GUI in Qt. GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.
• peercoin-votestars5 - A voting system based on data from the blockchain (addresses and balances). GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.
• Graphcool https://blog.graph.cool/
• crystars33 - Ability to execute crystal code in a fashion similar to Ruby's pry edit
• sqs-dropwizardstars14 - Amazon SQS integration
• Using Dropwizard in combination with Elasticsearch
• Use Consul's KV store for Dropwizard settings
• StackOverflow
• vue-chrome-extension-boilerplatestars245 - Boilerplate for Chrome extension using Vue.js and Webpack
• Styliststars279 - Define UI styles in a hot-loadable external yaml or json file.
• Beakstars562 - A command line interface for your Swift scripts.
• Screamerstars203 - augment Common Lisp with practically all of the functionality of both Prolog and constraint logic programming languages. Blog post solving Project Euler puzzles. MIT.
• serapeumstars338 - Another general-purpose utility library. Expat.
• anaphora - A collection of anaphoric macros. Public domain.
• sonos2mqttstars53 - A bridge between Sonos and MQTT.
• Bible - Bible reader with many versions and languages to choose from.
• Easestars1.3k - Animate everything with Ease.
• MCScratchImageViewstars354 - A custom ImageView that is used to cover the surface of other view like a scratch card, user can swipe the mulch to see the view below.
• Ciaostars54 - Publish and discover services using mDNS (Bonjour, Zeroconf).
• Shinystars763 - Iridescent Effect View (inspired by Apple Pay Cash).
• StatusAlertstars836 - Display Apple system-like self-hiding status alerts without interrupting user flow.

• General Bikeshare Feed Specification (GBFS)stars640 - Open data standard for real-time bikeshare information developed by members of the North American Bikeshare Association (NABSA).
    • gbfs-validatorstars10 - 3rd party tool to validate GBFS feeds.
    • gbfs R packagestars0 - Functions to interface with GBFS feeds in R, allowing users to save and accumulate tidy .rds datasets for specified cities/bikeshare programs.
    • GBFS Documentation Platform - Documentation platform for the General Bikeshare Feed Specification, maintaned by MobilityData. View the GBFS specification, change proposals, policy guides, and technical tools.

• GTFS-plusstars19 - A GTFS-based transit network format for vehicle and capacity data suitable for dynamic transit modeling developed by Puget Sound Regional Council, UrbanLabs LLC, LMZ LLC, and San Francisco County Transportation Authority.
• GTFS-statstars5 - An extension to a GTFS transit network with additional files that contain performance data developed by UrbanLabs LLC and San Francisco County Transportation Authority.
• Common Lisp the Language - The original standard for Common Lisp before the ANSI spec.

• Js4Girlsstars101 - Loc: - Lang: PT-BR only

    A Brazilian initiative to provide free javascript classes to women in a male-free environment.
• ROS 2 Distribution (rosdistro)stars2 - Info about distributions and the included packages.
• CLOS MOP specification - A modern public domain online version of chapters 5 and 6 of The Art of the Metaobject Protocol
• Appium Cucumber Teststars33 - Sample Appium Cucumber Project.
• vue-rangedate-pickerstars216 - Range date picker with simple usage
• zmartzone mod_auth_openidc for Apache 2.xstars825
• chronicitystars60 - A natural language date and time parse, to parse strings like "3 days from now". BSD_3Clause.
• osicat - A lightweight operating system interface on POSIX-like systems (directory iteration and deletion, environment variables, file permissions, etc) Expat.
• ocamlbrowser – A source and compiled interface browser, written using LablTk. Included in the standard distribution for ocaml <= 4.01 and with labltk for ocaml >= 4.02.

• Code coverage:
    • Bisect_ppxstars253
• DMG Schematics - Hardware schematics.
• Game Boy hardware database - Data and photos of various types of Game Boy consoles.

• Editor Integration:
    • ocaml-lspstars502 - An LSP language server for OCaml that integrates with any editor that understands LSP like VSCodestars137.8k, Vim and Emacs.
    • merlinstars1.4k – Context sensitive completion for Ocaml in Vim and Emacs.
    • tuaregstars324 - OCaml mode for Emacs that can run the toplevel and the debugger within Emacs.
    • merlin-eldocstars40 – Emacs package to provide merlin's features through eldoc.
    • vscode-ocamlstars175 – extension that provides OCaml language support for VSCodestars137.8k
    • OCaml Debuggerstars136 – extension that provides OCaml Debugger for VSCodestars137.8k
    • Sublime better ocamlstars23 – Better OCaml mode for Sublime Text.
      • Sublime text packagestars13
    • ocp-index – Easy access to the interface information of installed OCaml libraries. Provides standalone tools like ocp-browser and ocp-grep.
      • ocp-browser – Small ncurses-based API and documentation browser.
      • ocp-index-topstars19 – Toplevel directive for looking up documentation using ocp-index.
      • Sublime text package
    • ocp-indent – Indentation tool for OCaml, to be used from editors like Emacs and Vim.
      • Vim pluginstars27.
• Easy-Signature-Androidstars24 - An simple ui library that provides a plugable signature view.
• Hacklily - online LilyPond-based sheet music editor (with optional GitHub integration).
• vagrant-scpstars291 - Copy files to a Vagrant VM via SCP.
• Armstrong Economics - Educational blog about markets and the global economy.
• Kakulas Legal - Law firm that you won't find in the yellow pages.
• GLBooststars105 - Rendering library for 3D graphic geeks.
• GrimoireGL - Bridge between Web engineers and CG engineers.
• Hilo3dstars524 - WebGL rendering engine for 3D games.

nodes.categoryHTML: Projects to keep an eye on (ie projects in development)
nodes.itemHTML: • Umbrella Appstars206 - an open source Android App with lessons and checklists on digital and physical security topics ranging from sending a secure mail to dealing with physical surveillance and attending a protest safely. Also includes forms for responding to security incidents and feeds to ensure users are up to date with the latest security information for their area. Also available in Spanish and Chinese.
• ultrastars1.2k

• OpenMapTiles - Set of open-source tools for self-hosting of OpenStreetMap maps in more than 50 languages. It provides both raster as well as vector tiles, WMS and WMTS services for GIS programs, support for JavaScript viewers and mobile SDK. (BSD)
• Cutelyststars792 - A C++ Web Framework built on top of Qt, using the simple approach of Catalyst (Perl) framework. [LGPLv2.1+] website
• vue-img-viewstars32 - a plugin for Vue.js, you can drag / view / rotate pictures anywhere
• Crypto Jobs List - Crypto Jobs List is your #1 board to find and post crypto, bitcoin and blockchain jobs.
• Framer Experiments by Ed Chao - Several awesome examples with download links from designer at Dropbox.

• NetCoreCMSstars167 - An Open source ASP.NET Core 2.0 CMS. It currently supports MySQL and planned to implement MSSQL, SQLite and PostgreSQL. Also it is a modular CMS supports theme, skin, custom layout, widgets, multiple language (En, BN).
• hasura/hello-python-flask A boilerplate Flask application which can be deployed in 3 mins, with ready-to-use database, authentication and file APIs.
• qldebstars4 - Quicklisp systems to debian packages, along with deb-packagerstars4 (simply create a debian package by defining an s-expression) and an introductory blog post. Both MIT.
• ql-to-debstars20 - Update cl-* debian packages from Quicklisp releases. WTFPL.
• LibLogstars926 - Single file for you to either copy/paste or install via nuget, into your library/ framework/ application to provide a logging abstraction.
• QtSharpstars558 - Mono/.NET Bindings for Qt
• Visual Studio Code - Excellent open source editor from Microsoft, based on Electron.
• Nethereum - Bringing the love of Ethereum to .NET.
• Advancestars4.5k - A powerful animation framework for iOS, tvOS, and OS X.
• UIFontCompletestars1.3k - Font management (System & Custom) for iOS and tvOS.
• Zinglestars109 - An alert will display underneath your UINavigationBar.
• Add-Art - Replaces ads with art.
• Gandi - Domain registrar with a No Bullshit policy.
• Polyface Farms - Environmentally-friendly farm that relies on word of mouth to reach customers.
• quartznetstars5.3k - Quartz Enterprise Scheduler .NET http://www.quartz-scheduler.net.
• Selenestars564 - Selenide-inspired concise and readable automated test framework, supports Ajax well like Selenide.
• Selenidestars1.6k - A framework for writing easy-to-read and easy-to-maintain automated tests using a Fluent API. Selenide has a magic trick that resolves most problems with Ajax and timeouts.
• The implementation of Functional Programming Languages - A paper by Simon Peyton Jones
• Tolkstars577 - A web interface for doing i18n translations packaged as a Rails engine.
• WalletGenerator.net
• r/Entrepreneur - Not exclusive to indies/bootstrappers but still with relevant content for us.
• /r/EntrepreneurRideAlong

• Mixergy

    Startup Interview podcast hosted by Andrew Warner, who made $1 million a month from an online greeting card business.

• CandyJapan

    Revenue numbers and learnings from running a Japanese candy subscription box.

• StartupSchool

    Free event organized by seed accelerator YCombinator. You have to be a bit lucky to get in. Also, this suggestion goes a little bit against the idea of "bootstrapped" but YCombinator has a lot of good resources for us indie hackers!
• Hackers&Painters [$] by Paul Graham.
• SideProject Book - [$49].
• Storybookstars74.5k : "The UI development environment you'll love to use"
• fd-vuestars63 - Vue.js client for an IoT framework
• wildfirestars179 - A drop-in replacement for other comment plug-ins.
• Brandalism - International street art collective that subverts advertising in urban space.
• Coalition to Ban Billboard Blight - Defending the urban landscape of Los Angeles from a proliferation of billboards.
• What if there was no advertising?
• Vulkanostars3.4k - Safe and rich Rust wrapper around the Vulkan API. [MIT]
